name: Triton American Energy Corp.
summary: Triton American Energy Corp. provides exploration and production of crude oil and natural gas. It has interest in Graciela Gonzalez project, which is located in Zapata County, Texas. The company operates in well re-entry projects where proven reserves exist. Triton American Energy also offers well services. Triton American Energy Corp. was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Humble, Texas with additional offices in Houston, Texas.
